description: This is a portal of Indian Railways for information and services provided by various Indian Railway organizations, Railway Ministry, Government of India.
vision: Vision - To become a world-class manufacturer of Diesel-Electric Locomotives with reliable, cost-effective, and state-of-the-art technology.
mission: Mission - To fulfill our vision by:
missionPoints: Ensuring reliability and continuous improvement in product quality through customer satisfaction.
Innovation, human resource development, and teamwork to develop competency.
Conservation of energy and natural resources for a clean environment.
